sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ رَمْزًا لِلْحَفَاوَةِ، حَيْثُ تُقَدَّمُ لِلضُّيُوفِ فَوْرَ وُصُولِهِمْ تَعْبِيرًا عَنِ التَّقْدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa predstavlja simbol srdačnosti, jer se gostima poslužuje odmah po dolasku kao izraz poštovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee represents a symbol of hospitality, as it is served to guests immediately upon their arrival as an expression of appreciation.

sentences.arabic: تُحَضَّرُ هَذِهِ الْقَهْوَةُ بِعِنَايَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ، إِذْ تُضَافُ إِلَيْهَا حُبُوبُ الْهَيْلِ لِتُكْسِبَهَا رَائِحَةً نَفَّاذَةً وَطَعْمًا فَرِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Ova kafa se priprema s velikom pažnjom, jer joj se dodaju zrna kardamoma kako bi dobila prodoran miris i jedinstven ukus.
sentences.translationEn: This coffee is prepared with great care, as cardamom pods are added to give it a pungent aroma and a unique taste.

sentences.arabic: وَعَادَةً مَا تُرَافِقُ الْقَهْوَةَ أَنْوَاعٌ فَاخِرَةٌ مِنَ التُّمُورِ الَّتِي تُوَازِنُ بِمَذَاقِهَا الْحُلْوِ مَرَارَةَ الْقَهْوَةِ السَّوْدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Obično kafu prate vrhunske vrste hurmi, koje svojim slatkim ukusom balansiraju gorčinu crne kafe.
sentences.translationEn: Usually, the coffee is accompanied by luxury types of dates, which balance the bitterness of the black coffee with their sweet taste.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ طُقُوسَ صَبِّ الْقَهْوَةِ بِالْيَدِ الْيُسْرَى وَتَقْدِيمِهَا بِالْيَمِينِ تَعْكِسُ تَقَالِيدَ عَرِيقَةً تَنَاقَلَتْهَا الْأَجْيَالُ.
sentences.translation: Rituali točenja kafe lijevom rukom i posluživanja desnom odražavaju drevne tradicije koje su se prenosile generacijama.
sentences.translationEn: The rituals of pouring coffee with the left hand and serving it with the right reflect ancient traditions passed down through generations.
